title: CWSM Enhancements
description: This is a small enhancement pack for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod, which changes some textures and audio files for a better Wither Storm experience!
body:
### **NOTE: This mod requires [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) to work!**

---

This is a small enhancement pack resource pack, which changes a few textures and audio files for a much better Wither Storm experience!

#### ADDITIONS:

New textures such as:
- darker flesh textures (applies to everything)
- flesh at the bottom of ribcage tentacles to indicate it poked itself out of the WS' body
- retextured the flame of the flaming wither skull so it matches the skull texture
- small changes to the WS sickness overlay texture
- recut the tractor beam overlay so it matches 16:9 screens without stretching
- new wither sickness effect icon

And new sounds such as:
- added outside effect to grow on bowels_transport
- command_block_activates uses sound of wither_storm_reactivates
- command_block_build uses WS roars instead of CMD block hit sound at the end
- command_block_pulse_loop polished up using a lowpass filter so some weird noise is gone
- extended earth rumble with better fade
- new slightly better F-Bomb explosion sounds
- WS themes swapped with the upgraded reuploads of Antimo & Welles
- wither_storm_reviving_theme uses "101 Credits" instead of the WS theme
- new WS death sound
- new WS evolution sound
- wither_storm_reactivates has some massive distant sound effect applied so it sounds like it comes from far away
- realigned wither_storm_splits to match new F-Bomb sounds
- old Withered Symbiont music, can be found in V4 as a seperate resource pack download

By the way, [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jpEneUGqgRw) is a video which showcases some of these!

**Important:** for this resource pack to work, put it above the mod resources in case it isn't

---

### Credits:

Cracker's Wither Storm Mod for some audio used to remake WS death and evolution sounds

[earth rumbling video on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NfcAGablk-I) which has been added to the cave rumbling sound from the mod

[GoldSlimeling91 on GitHub](https://github.com/nonamecrackers2/crackers-wither-storm-mod/issues/706) for the new wither sickness icon

Audacity (audio editing software) for removal of command block pulse ringing

Paint 3D by Microsoft which I used to edit all of the textures
